title: Epiamomum angustipetalum
taxonomy: Epiamomum angustipetalum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It belongs to the genus Epiamomum, which is a group of plants closely related to Asparagus. Within the family Asparagaceae, Epiamomum angustipetalum is further classified in the subfamily Lomandroideae. The plant is native to Australia, where it can be found in various habitats. It is an evergreen perennial that produces small, greenish-yellow flowers in the summer months.
